title: Issues with Embedding Monday.com Dashboards on My WordPress Site
excerpt:

posts.author: fabinasari (fabina sari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday Community,

I’ve been trying to embed Monday.com dashboards into my WordPress site, WP Troubles, to showcase project progress and provide real-time updates to my visitors. However, I’m encountering a few issues that I’m hoping someone here might be able to help with:

  1. Dashboard Not Displaying Correctly: The embedded dashboard sometimes fails to load or displays incorrectly on certain pages. I’ve double-checked the embed code and tried different themes, but the issue persists. This is affecting the user experience on my site.
  2. Interactivity Problems: The interactive features of the Monday.com dashboard, such as filtering and clicking through to tasks, don’t always work when embedded. This limits the functionality I want to provide to my users and clients directly through my site.
  3. Mobile Responsiveness Issues: The embedded dashboard isn’t fully responsive on mobile devices. It either cuts off important content or doesn’t scale properly, which is a major concern since a significant portion of my audience accesses the site via mobile.

I’ve outlined these problems in more detail on my site Wp Troubles including screenshots and the troubleshooting steps I’ve already taken. Has anyone else faced similar challenges with embedding Monday.com dashboards? Any advice or solutions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks for your assistance!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @fabinasari and welcome to the community!

Would you be able to please fill this form adding as much information as possible to it so that our team can take a look into it?
